name: Lexion AI Contract Management API
what_it_does: Lexion REST API for AI-powered contract management and workflow automation platform. Enables AI agents to manage contract repository search and metadata retrieval for contract intelligence, handle AI-assisted contract data extraction for key term and obligation identification, access contract workflow management including intake, review, and approval automation, retrieve contract renewal and expiration alert data for proactive management, manage vendor and counterparty relationship contract portfolio, handle contract template and playbook configuration access, access obligation tracking and compliance monitoring data, retrieve contract analytics and portfolio metrics, manage contract integration with Salesforce, DocuSign, and Google Workspace, and integrate contract intelligence with procurement, legal ops, and finance platforms.
use_cases: Searching contract repositories from legal operations agents
Tracking contract renewals and expirations from contract management agents
Extracting contract obligations from compliance tracking agents
Integrating contract data with procurement from vendor management agents
not_for: M&A due diligence at scale without contract portfolio management focus
Contract drafting without contract intelligence and repository management
Consumer legal tools without enterprise contract management and legal ops
best_when: A legal operations or procurement team using Lexion wants AI agents to automate contract search, obligation tracking, renewal alerting, workflow management, and integration with CRM and e-signature platforms.
avoid_when: LEGAL RISK: AI contract extraction for obligations and risk terms requires attorney review before compliance actions — automated obligation decisions without legal review can cause contract breaches. Automated contract workflow approvals must respect configured authority matrix; bypassing approval levels has audit and governance consequences.

auth.notes: Lexion uses OAuth 2.0 and API key authentication. Per-organization credentials. Developer documentation at lexion.ai/developers. Webhooks for contract lifecycle events. REST API with JSON responses. Google Workspace native integration. Salesforce CRM connector. DocuSign and Adobe Sign e-signature integration. SOC2 Type II certified. Acquired by Docusign (2024).

pricing.free_tier_limits: No free tier — annual enterprise subscription
pricing.paid_tiers: Annual subscription; user count and contract volume determine pricing
pricing.notes: Seattle, Washington. Founded 2018. Acquired by DocuSign (2024). AI contract management market. Known for legal operations team focus and Google Workspace integration. Strong in mid-market and SME legal ops. DocuSign acquisition positions Lexion as CLM component of DocuSign IAM platform. Competes with Ironclad and Evisort for contract intelligence market.

performance.rate_limits: Rate limits per API key; documented in developer portal

known_agent_gotchas: LEGAL RISK: Contract obligation extraction requires attorney review before compliance actions; automated obligation enforcement without legal review can cause contract breach
DocuSign acquisition — Lexion acquired by DocuSign (2024); API and product roadmap evolving under DocuSign ownership; verify current API status
Google Workspace integration — Lexion has native Google Workspace integration; Google Drive contract storage and Gmail workflow are first-class features
Webhook for lifecycle events — use webhooks for contract status change events (execution, expiration, renewal); polling contract list is inefficient
Contract intelligence latency — AI extraction for newly added contracts has processing latency; don't expect real-time extraction on upload
Mid-market focus — Lexion is optimized for mid-market legal ops teams; very high-volume M&A due diligence at enterprise scale may require additional tools
agent_readiness.security_notes: Contract management and CLM. SOC2, GDPR, CCPA. OAuth2/API key. US. Contract repository and obligation data.

security_score_components.security_notes: CLM and contract intelligence. SOC2, GDPR. OAuth2/API key. US. Contract and legal obligation data.
